_comment: Real hooks for clip_001. 159 unique hooks × 8 recipes = 1272 captioned outputs per source. Each post is a different angle/voice on the same scene.
hooks:

hooks:
you look like trouble
and I look like fun

some of you would fall in love
in 3 days flat

the ones who scroll past
always come back

I'm not everyone's type.
just the dangerous ones

the last person who said
"you're not my type"
is still texting me

I give everyone one chance.
you just used yours

be the type of man
that makes me put my phone down

I respond to DMs.
I just don't respond to basic ones

you'd like me more
if you knew me less

I googled "how to be less attractive"
and got zero results

pov: it's 2am and I just texted you
"you up?"

pov: I'm the girl
you rejected in high school

pov: we match on hinge
and you can't think of an opener

pov: your older brother
won't stop talking about me

pov: you finally get my attention
and freeze
pov: I slide into YOUR dms first

would you take me on a proper date
or just invite me over?

hold my hand in public
or pretend you don't know me?

approach me first
or wait for me to come to you?

drop your age
and I'll tell you your score

type your nationality
and I'll tell you if you have a chance

type "hi" if you've been staring
for more than 5 seconds

say something that would
actually make me stay

comment your height.
I'll start: I'm 5'4 and I love tall men

my face says innocent.
my thoughts disagree.

the baby face is a trap.
a very effective one.

doctors say I have the face of an angel.
they haven't met me.

I come with a warning label
nobody reads
highlight the hidden word: tHOTtie

I'm fluent in 3 languages:
English, sarcasm, and touch

my ex called me T.M.I.
— Too Much Irresistible

the letters A, S, S are hiding
in mASSage.
you're welcome.

_hook_strategy: 159 unique hooks, line-broken at natural pauses for readable two/three-line captions. Each hook combined with each of the 8 default recipes yields 1272 outputs.
